summary: Stunning matrix recording of a classic 1983 show with crystal‑clear sound and killer Scarlet > Fire, Estimated Prophet and Eyes of the World jams.
review: The matrix mix is praised as “clean, clear and crisp” and even called the best ever heard, delivering an immaculate listening experience. Musically the performance shines – the first set rolls strong and the second set builds into a monumental Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain sequence, a soaring Estimated Prophet, and one of the reviewer’s favorite Eyes of the World excursions, all capped by a jazzy encore jam.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers are enthusiastic; two give 5‑star ratings and highlight both superb musical moments and an exceptional matrix mix, yielding a top‑tier combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the mix "clean, clear and crisp" and label it the best matrix they've heard; no technical flaws are noted.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as "incredible" with sustained energy; second set praised for its tension‑and‑release arc, long improvisational peaks, and a jazzy encore that epitomizes late‑'80s Dead.
